commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4970f72e8e7e84f52bda1c43350c1d1834921ba0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds ACP sessions_spawn image attachment validation, forwards validated images through the Gateway agent attachment contract into ACP run turns, adds a tools.sessions_spawn.attachments.acpEnabled config flag, and updates tests/docs/types.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main rejects ACP sessions_spawn attachments before dispatch, and the PR's remaining full-path risk is source-checkable in the Gateway attachment parser/model gate. I did not establish a live ACP/Codex image run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor live proof and maintainer approval of the ACP image capability/config policy are still required, so this is not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix #78919: [Bug] ACP sessions_spawn doesn't route images to Codex's native vision like acpx codex exec does
target.body:
## Summary
Fixes #78919

`sessions_spawn(runtime="acp", agentId="codex")` now routes validated image attachments through the gateway image attachment contract so they reach the ACP turn path used by Codex native vision.

## Changes
- Convert ACP turn attachments to the gateway-supported nested base64 image source shape before calling the gateway `agent` method.
- Keep ACP runtime turns using `{ mediaType, data }` after gateway parsing, where that shape belongs.
- Add `tools.sessions_spawn.attachments.acpEnabled` so ACP inline image forwarding requires an explicit second opt-in in addition to `attachments.enabled`.
- Preserve existing attachment limits and validation: image-only for ACP, strict base64 handling, duplicate/name checks, max files, per-file bytes, and total bytes.
- Update tests, config schema/types, and gateway attachment docs.

## Changed files
```text
docs/gateway/config-tools.md                 |  10 +-
src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts                 |  39 ++++++++
src/agents/acp-spawn.ts                      |  29 ++++++
src/agents/agent-command.ts                  |   3 +
src/agents/subagent-attachments.ts           | 130 ++++++++++++++++++++++++-
src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts | 136 +++++++++++++++++++++++++--
src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.ts      |  13 ++-
src/config/types.tools.ts                    |  15 +++
src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts       |   1 +
9 files changed, 361 insertions(+), 15 deletions(-)
```

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: ACP `sessions_spawn` image attachments used to be rejected or could be lost before ACP dispatch. The fixed path is:

```text
sessions_spawn attachments
  -> ACP-specific policy and image validation
  -> spawnAcpDirect attachments
  -> gateway `agent` RPC image source attachment
  -> gateway attachment normalization
  -> agent-command images
  -> ACP runTurn attachments
```

**Local environment tested**: Linux x86_64, Node 22, OpenClaw dev checkout.

**Commands run after the patch**:

```bash
git diff --check
pnpm test src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts test/scripts/lint-suppressions.test.ts
pnpm check:changed
pnpm check:test-types
```

**Observed results**:

```text
ACP spawn related tests: 2 test files passed, 106 tests passed
lint suppression tests: 1 test file passed, 3 tests passed
check:changed: passed
check:test-types: passed
```

**Boundary proof added**:

- `src/agents/acp-spawn.test.ts` now verifies that `spawnAcpDirect` sends gateway-compatible image source attachments instead of raw ACP turn attachments at the gateway RPC boundary.
- `src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts` now verifies that ACP attachments require both `attachments.enabled` and `attachments.acpEnabled`, and that non-image and size-limit failures still block dispatch.

**GitHub checks**:

- `Real behavior proof` passes on the current PR head.
- Full PR checks are being re-run after the latest push.

**Not tested locally**: a live local Codex ACP image run. The local host path was blocked by the installed `codex-acp` binary requiring `libssl.so.3`, and auxiliary Codex CLI proof required valid provider credentials. No live output is fabricated here.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: zhangguiping-xydt
